description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ! Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case with crystal embellishments Dial style: Pink dial with metallic hands and branding displayed on the dial Strap style: Pink genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures:  Screw to reset time    Waterproof to 3 BAR,  allowing you to wear it even when showering Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 36 mm  Case thickness: 5 mm
